title: clone-kb frontmatter schema
description: frontmatter contract for every card under techniques/, pipelines/, cases/. Adapted from the team KB Git spec (팀 KB Git 운영 규격 v1) §4, specialized for the clone-campaign knowledge domain.

id.description: Unique id, MUST match the file path: techniques/rip-dump.md -> techniques.rip-dump

doctype.description: technique = single reusable method card. pipeline = ordered assembly of techniques. case = campaign progress record.

status.description: experimental = tried once/aspirational, not yet cross-validated. verified = worked in >=1 real campaign with evidence. standard = cross-validated in >=2 independent campaigns, safe to skill-package. retired = superseded, kept for history only.

proven_in.description: Which campaigns actually exercised this technique with evidence (not just documented intent).

superseded_by.description: id of the replacement card. Required when status=retired.

related.description: ids of related cards -- these become graph edges.

evidence.description: Pointers to real proof: file paths, worklog lines, numbers. Not URLs to nowhere -- must be checkable against the source project.

updated.description: YYYY-MM-DD, bump on every substantive edit.

x-sync-rule: status=standard 인 기법만 skills/ 에 스킬로 존재할 수 있다. 카드가 강등(standard->verified 이하)되거나 은퇴되면 대응하는 skills/*/SKILL.md 도 함께 업그레이드하거나 제거하고 ledger/ 에 그 사실을 기록한다. 승격/은퇴는 GitHub Issue로 제안 후 오너 승인.
x-lifecycle: 날것(raw 관찰) -> experimental(1회 시도) -> verified(실증 1회+근거) -> standard(2개 이상 캠페인 교차검증) -> [반례 발견 시 강등] / [대체기법 등장 시 retired]
